markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX.ai and Loganix for link building and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai seeks a reliable link building partner for their clients, ranging from Series A startups to large companies like Reddit and Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Loganix offers flexible link building services, from transactional to strategic partnerships, with pricing ranging from \~$200-$1000+ per link](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Loganix can provide additional SEO services like keyword research, local SEO, and content creation as needed](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Typical turnaround time for standard link building is 8-10 days, with more complex requests taking longer](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Business Model and Needs

  - [AI-powered growth agency serving B2B clients like Webflow, AppNormal Securities, Ramp, and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Offers end-to-end SEO services, including link building, which they currently outsource](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Seeking a reliable partner for consistent, high-quality link building across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Flexible on engagement model, from transactional to strategic partnership](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Loganix's Service Offerings

  - [Core business (70%) is link building, with additional SEO services available](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Two main engagement models:](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
    1.  Transactional: Fixed-price "authority links" ($400-$600 per link)
    2.  Strategic Partnership: Publisher fee plus margin, more flexible pricing ($200-$1000+ per link)
  - [Customizable workflow integration (Asana, spreadsheets, Notion, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Additional services: local SEO, keyword research, content creation](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

### Link Building Process and Expectations

  - [Average turnaround time: 8-10 days for standard requests](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Longer timelines for specialized niches (e.g., European markets, crypto)](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Flexible approval process: client can review and approve each link or set criteria for automatic approval](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Loganix can source new publishers for specific client needs](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

### Pricing and Quality Considerations

  - [Link prices vary based on metrics (Domain Rating, traffic, etc.) and publisher relationships](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Higher-end clients (e.g., HubSpot) may require more authoritative links (DR 70+) for competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Loganix recommends against very low-cost links ($190) for most clients, as they may not be effective](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send Loganix specific link building requirements and objectives for GrowthX.ai clients](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Jason to explore potential keyword research project with Loganix](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Loganix to provide detailed pricing and service options based on GrowthX.ai's needs](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [If moving forward, expect 1-week onboarding process followed by active link building in week 2](https://fathom.video/share/1Hz23ryb_rAyzmxLyeQ2-Msh-cKs_r9_?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
